SELECT count_if(value IS NOT NULL) FROM test_table;
SELECT count_if(value = 1) AS count_ones, count_if(value < 0) AS count_negatives FROM test_table;
SELECT count_if(value = (SELECT MAX(value) FROM test_table)) FROM test_table;
SELECT count_if(tb.value > 10 AND sb.number IS NOT NULL) FROM test_table tb JOIN second_table sb ON tb.value + sb.number > 20;
SELECT (SELECT count_if(value > 0) FROM test_table) + (SELECT count_if(number IS NOT NULL) FROM second_table) AS total_positive_count;
WITH cte AS (SELECT value FROM test_table WHERE value IS NOT NULL) SELECT count_if(value) FROM cte;
